name: The Wild Adventures of Blinky Bill
original_name: The Wild Adventures of Blinky Bill
overview: Blinky Bill is back to bring his trademark mischief, mayhem, and humour to life. Along with his best mate and sidekick Jacko, Blinky takes on the role as defender of his outback home, Greenpatch.

trailers.title: The Wild Adventures of Blinky Bill Trailer 2016
